sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_sort (id Int32, values Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arraySort(values) AS sorted_values FROM test_array_sort;
UPDATE test_array_sort SET values = arraySort(values) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arraySort((x) -> -x, values) AS descending_values FROM test_array_sort;
